pi_items.source: Task specification and DHIS2 User Roles documentation. This is a custom role to be created; not a predefined DHIS2 role.
DHIS2 Core i18n_global.properties from dhis2/dhis2-core GitHub repository. Authority definition: 'Add/Update Data Value'
DHIS2 app authority system. M_dhis-web-dataentry is the standard Data Entry app module authority in DHIS2.
DHIS2 Core i18n_global.properties from dhis2/dhis2-core GitHub repository. Authority definition: 'Delete Data Value'
DHIS2 Community documentation and release notes. 'ALL' is a special superuser authority that grants full system access.
Task description emphasizes 'least-privilege security policy' and explicit exclusion of delete authority. This is confirmed security-focused task.
Official DHIS2 demo databases hosted at databases.dhis2.org and d2-ci/dhis2-demo-db GitHub repository. Real, production-quality demo data from Sierra Leone health system.
DHIS2 Release Notes available at docs.dhis2.org. Version 2.40 is an official DHIS2 release with multiple point versions (2.40.1, 2.40.2, 2.40.4).

privileged_info_summary: This task involves creating a restricted user role in DHIS2 (District Health Information Software) with a least-privilege security policy. The role 'Clerk - Entry Only' must have F_DATAVALUE_ADD (Add/Update Data Value) and M_dhis-web-dataentry (Data Entry app access) authorities, while explicitly excluding F_DATAVALUE_DELETE (Delete Data Value) and ALL (superuser) authorities. DHIS2 is a real, open-source health information management system; the task uses the official Sierra Leone demo database (DHIS2 version 2.40) downloaded from the official DHIS2 project repository. All specified authorities are valid DHIS2 authorities confirmed in the official DHIS2 source code (i18n_global.properties) and documentation.
